description: Log stream with level badges, highlighted critical line, and callout annotation

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above log panel, e.g. 'SYSTEM LOG — BREACH DAY'
fields.KEY_PATH: Log file path shown in header, e.g. '/var/log/auth.log'
fields.LOG_LINE_4: Log line 4 — this line gets highlighted
fields.KEY_VALUE: Annotation below highlighted line, e.g. '← unauthorized sudo escalation detected'
